title: Runic Enchanting
description: Craft enchanted books using runes found throughout the world.
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GkpgRKV2/images/86c14fbbda59f172ad4a33ffdb9d4e7a5c4297f8.png)

**Runic Enchanting** adds a way to craft enchanted books using runes found throughout the world.

  
  
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brotazoa/runic_enchanting/master/img/banner_rune_enchanting.png)

Every enchantment can be crafted with a sequence of rune pages at the **Rune Enchanting Table**.

  
  
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brotazoa/runic_enchanting/master/img/banner_rune_scribing.png)

Rune pages are written at the **Rune Scribing Table**. Much like how the vanilla enchanting table behaves with bookshelves, the Rune Scribing Table needs **Rune Blocks** nearby. Inorder to craft a rune page the corresponding rune block must be within range of the Scribing Table.

  
  
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brotazoa/runic_enchanting/master/img/rune_block_in_the_wild.png)

Rune Blocks generate naturally in the Overworld and Nether dimensions. You can find a variety of Rune Structures on the surface, in caves, and even underwater. Each structure will have one or more rune blocks. This is a Life Rune carved onto a chiseled stone bricks block, which generated in a lush caves biome.

  
  
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brotazoa/runic_enchanting/master/img/rune_copy.png)

Rune blocks when mined will drop their respective chiseled block variant, even with the Silk Touch enchantment. To obtain rune blocks for the Scribing Table use **Chalk** on the block while holding paper in the offhand. This will make a **Rune Pattern** of that rune, which can be used to make additional rune blocks in the future.

  
  
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brotazoa/runic_enchanting/master/img/rune_paste.png)

A rune pattern has no durability, so will never break, and is not used up in the process of making a rune block. Once a rune pattern is obtained it can be infinitely used to make new rune blocks. To make a rune block, use a **Chisel** on any chiseled block, like chiseled stone bricks, while holding the desired rune pattern in the offhand. This will convert the chiseled block into a rune block.

Rune Patterns can also be used at the Loom to draw patterns on banners, which can then be applied to shields.
  
<details><summary>Runes</summary>

*   **Air Rune:** Found commonly in the Overworld
*   **Armor Rune:** Found commonly in the Overworld
*   **Cunning Rune:** Found uncommonly in the Nether
*   **Damage Rune:** Found uncommonly in the Overworld, but commonly in the Nether
*   **Destruction Rune:** Found rarely in the Overworld, and Nether
*   **Earth Rune:** Found commonly in the Overworld
*   **Equipment Rune:** Found commonly in the Overworld
*   **Fire Rune:** Found commonly in the Nether
*   **Force Rune:** Only found in the Deep Dark
*   **Inventory Rune:** Never naturally generated, only found as a pattern in Desert Pyramids
*   **Life Rune:** Found rarely in the Overworld
*   **Luck Rune:** Found rarely in the Overworld
*   **Melee Rune:** Found commonly in the Overworld
*   **Preservation Rune:** Never naturally generated, only found as a pattern in the Woodland Mansion
*   **Protection Rune:** Found uncommonly in the Overworld
*   **Range Rune:** Found commonly in the Overworld
*   **Revenge Rune:** Never naturally generated, only found as a pattern in Pillager Outposts
*   **Speed Rune:** Found commonly in deserts
*   **Spirit Rune:** Found rarely in the Nether
*   **Time Rune:** Never naturally generated, only found as a pattern in Stronghold Libraries
*   **Tool Rune:** Found commonly in the Overworld
*   **Water Rune:** Found commonly in the Overworld

</details>
<details><summary>Mod Integrations</summary>

As of version 1.0-rc1, Runic Enchanting includes recipes for enchantments from these mods.
If you want to see Runic Enchanting support more mods, make a suggestion on GitHub or the Discord.

*   [Charm](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/charm)
*   [Enchanted Shulkers](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantedshulkers)
*   [Fabric Enchantments](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-enchantments)
*   [Imperishable Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/imperishableitemsfabric)
*   [MoEnchantments](https://modrinth.com/mod/moenchantments)

</details>

If you have ideas, or want to talk about Runic Enchanting, consider joining the discord.

[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brotazoa/runic_enchanting/master/img/amorphia_modding_banner.png)](https://discord.gg/W5yXwW8yAA)
